subcodes.title: Words to the friends, spoken on 1915-06-26
subcodes.first_line: When We were there [in Mardin], on the day We set forth upon Our journey, a certain man came, crying aloud that he had in truth beheld the night before [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در آنجا [ماردین] بودیم، روزی که حرکت کردیم شخصی آمد و داد و فریاد می زد که من دیشب باطمینان
subcodes.subjects: @stories; anecdotes, @power of the Manifestation of God
